text:
// This file contains the styling for making the content throughout the page,
// including fonts, paragraphs, headings and spacing among these elements.

body
  font-family: var(--font-stack)
pre,
code,
kbd,
samp
  font-family: var(--font-stack--monospace)

// Make fonts look slightly nicer.
body
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale

// Line height from Bootstrap 4.1
article
  line-height: 1.5

//
// Headings
//
h1,
h2,
h3,
h4,
h5,
h6
  line-height: 1.25
  font-weight: bold

  border-radius: 0.5rem
  margin-top: 0.5rem
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem
  margin-left: -0.5rem
  margin-right: -0.5rem
  padding-left: 0.5rem
  padding-right: 0.5rem

  + p
    margin-top: 0

h1
  font-size: 2.5em
  margin-top: 1.75rem
  margin-bottom: 1rem
h2
  font-size: 2em
  margin-top: 1.75rem
h3
  font-size: 1.5em
h4
  font-size: 1.25em
h5
  font-size: 1.125em
h6
  font-size: 1em

small
  opacity: 75%
  font-size: 80%

// Paragraph
p
  margin-top: 0.5rem
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem

// Horizontal rules
hr.docutils
  height: 1px
  padding: 0
  margin: 2rem 0
  background-color: var(--color-background-border)
  border: 0

.centered
  text-align: center

// Links
a
  text-decoration: underline

  color: var(--color-link)
  text-decoration-color: var(--color-link-underline)

  &:hover
    color: var(--color-link--hover)
    text-decoration-color: var(--color-link-underline--hover)
  &.muted-link
    color: inherit
    &:hover
      color: var(--color-link)
      text-decoration-color: var(--color-link-underline--hover)

// including fonts, paragraphs, headings and spacing among these elements.

body
  font-family: var(--font-stack)
pre,
code,
kbd,
samp
  font-family: var(--font-stack--monospace)

      color: var(--color-link)
      text-decoration-color: var(--color-link-underline--hover)

@import '../quarks/border'
@import '../quarks/typography'


.yoo-card
  +border('sm', var(--greyLight), solid, 'md')
  +box-shadow('soft', var(--greyLight))
  font-family: var(--fontFamily-primary)
  padding: var(--spacing-md)

  &__fill
    &--white
      background-color: var(--color-white)
      $color: var(--greyDark)
      color: $color

      .yoo-card__subtitle
        color: lighten(#5A5F67, 10%)

    &--primary
      background-color: var(--primaryBase)
      $color: var(--color-white)
      color: $color

      .yoo-card__subtitle
        color: darken(#FFF, 10%)

    &--danger
      background-color: var(--dangerBase)
      $color: var(--color-white)
      color: $color

      .yoo-card__subtitle
        color: $color

    &--neutral
      background-color: var(--greyBase)
      $color: var(--color-white)
      color: $color

      .yoo-card__subtitle
        color: $color

    &--light
      background-color: var(--greyLight)
      $color: var(--greyDark)
      color: $color

      .yoo-card__subtitle
        color: lighten(#5A5F67, 10%)

    &--dark
      background-color: var(--greyDark)
      $color: var(--color-white)
      color: $color

      .yoo-card__subtitle
        color: darken(#FFF, 10%)

  &__icon
    margin-bottom: 10px

  &__title
    margin: 0
    +font-size('lg')

  &__subtitle
    margin: 0
    +font-size('md')

@import '../bosons/margin'
@import '../bosons/padding'
@import '../bosons/YooGridLayout'
@import '../bosons/YooFlexLayout'
@import '../bosons/YooScrollView'



@import '../quarks/animation'
@import '../quarks/border'
@import '../quarks/shadows'
@import '../quarks/typography'
@import '../quarks/flex'

.yoo-tag
  +font-family('$font-primary')

  &__notag
    +font-weight('medium')
    +font-size('md')
    word-wrap: anywhere
    color: var(--greyBase)

  &__item
    $self: &
    +font-weight('medium')
    +font-size('xs')
    text-align: right
    word-wrap: anywhere
    padding: var(--spacing-xs) var(--spacing-sm)
    margin: 0 var(--spacing-xs) var(--spacing-xs) 0
    color: var(--greyBase)
    +border('sm', var(--greyBase), solid, 'lg')

  &__fill
    &--primary.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: var(--primaryDark)
      +border('sm', var(--primaryDark), solid, 'lg')
    &--danger.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: var(--dangerBase)
      +border('sm', var(--dangerBase), solid, 'lg')
    &--neutral.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: var(--greyBase)
      +border('sm', var(--greyBase), solid, 'lg')
    &--dark.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: var(--greyDark)
      +border('sm', var(--greyDark), solid, 'lg')
    &--black.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: var(--color-black)
      +border('sm', var(--color-black), solid, 'lg')
    &--white.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: var(--color-white)
      +border('sm', var(--color-white), solid, 'lg')

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+keyframes(rotateIn)
  0%
    +transform-origin(center center)
    +rotate(-200deg)
    opacity: 0
  100%
    +transform-origin(center center)
    +rotate(0)
    opacity: 1


// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+keyframes(rotateInDownLeft)
  0%
    +transform-origin(left bottom)
    +rotate(-90deg)
    opacity: 0
  100%
    +transform-origin(left bottom)
    +rotate(0)
    opacity: 1


// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+keyframes(rotateInUpLeft)
  0%
    +transform-origin(left bottom)
    +rotate(90deg)
    opacity: 0
  100%
    +transform-origin(left bottom)
    +rotate(0)
    opacity: 1


// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+keyframes(rotateInUpRight)
  0%
    +transform-origin(right bottom)
    +rotate(-90deg)
    opacity: 0
  100%
    +transform-origin(right bottom)
    +rotate(0)
    opacity: 1


// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+keyframes(rotateInDownRight)
  0%
    +transform-origin(right bottom)
    +rotate(90deg)
    opacity: 0
  100%
    +transform-origin(right bottom)
    +rotate(0)
    opacity: 1

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+keyframes(rotateOut)
  0%
    +transform-origin(center center)
    +rotate(0)
    opacity: 1
  100%
    +transform-origin(center center)
    +rotate(200deg)
    opacity: 0


// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+keyframes(rotateOutDownLeft)
  0%
    +transform-origin(left bottom)
    +rotate(0)
    opacity: 1
  100%
    +transform-origin(left bottom)
    +rotate(90deg)
    opacity: 0


// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+keyframes(rotateOutUpLeft)
  0%
    +transform-origin(left bottom)
    +rotate(0)
    opacity: 1
  100%
    +transform-origin(left bottom)
    +rotate(-90deg)
    opacity: 0


// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+keyframes(rotateOutDownRight)
  0%
    +transform-origin(right bottom)
    +rotate(0)
    opacity: 1
  100%
    +transform-origin(right bottom)
    +rotate(-90deg)
    opacity: 0


// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+keyframes(rotateOutUpRight)
  0%
    +transform-origin(right bottom)
    +rotate(0)
    opacity: 1
  100%
    +transform-origin(right bottom)
    +rotate(90deg)
    opacity: 0

@import "../utilities/variables.sass"

.content
  +block
  color: $text
  // Inline
  a:not(.button)
    border-bottom: 1px solid $border
    &:visited
      color: $link-visited
    &:hover
      border-bottom-color: $link
  li + li
    margin-top: 0.25em
  // Block
  blockquote,
  p,
  ol,
  ul
    &:not(:last-child)
      margin-bottom: 1em
  h1,
  h2,
  h3,
  h4,
  h5,
  h6
    color: $text-strong
    font-weight: 300
    line-height: 1.125
    margin-bottom: 20px
  h1,
  h2,
  h3
    &:not(:first-child)
      margin-top: 40px
  blockquote
    background-color: $background
    border-left: 5px solid $border
    padding: 1.5em
  h1
    font-size: 2em
  h2
    font-size: 1.75em
  h3
    font-size: 1.5em
  h4
    font-size: 1.25em
  h5
    font-size: 1.125em
  h6
    font-size: 1em
  ol
    list-style: decimal outside
    margin-left: 2em
    margin-right: 2em
    margin-top: 1em
  ul
    list-style: disc outside
    margin-left: 2em
    margin-right: 2em
    margin-top: 1em
    ul
      list-style-type: circle
      margin-top: 0.5em
      ul
        list-style-type: square
  // Sizes
  &.is-medium
    font-size: $size-5
    code
      font-size: $size-6
  &.is-large
    font-size: $size-4
    code
      font-size: $size-5

@import "../base/classes.sass"
@import "../utilities/variables.sass"

  h4

  // Sizes

@import '../bosons/margin'
@import '../bosons/padding'
@import '../bosons/YooGridLayout'
@import '../bosons/YooFlexLayout'
@import '../bosons/YooScrollView'



@import '../quarks/animation'
@import '../quarks/border'
@import '../quarks/shadows'
@import '../quarks/typography'
@import '../quarks/flex'


.yoo-dropdown
  cursor: pointer
  font-family: var(--fontFamily-primary)
  +font-weight('regular')
  text-transform: uppercase
  +box-shadow('soft', #00000029)
  border-radius: 1px
  font-family: var(--fontFamily-primary)
  +font-weight('medium')
  color: var(--greyBase)
  width: max-content

  &__select
    .select
      +flex(row, wrap, center, center)
      overflow: hidden
      &__text
        font-family: var(--fontFamily-primary)
        +font-weight('semi-bold')
        color: var(--greyDark)
        margin: 15px 20px

  &__options
    .option
      +flex(row, wrap, center, center)
      overflow: hidden
      &__text
        font-family: var(--fontFamily-primary)
        +font-weight('semi-bold')
        color: var(--greyBase)
        margin: 15px 20px

      &:first-child
        .option
          &__text
            color: var(--greyDark)

  // MOD: VARIATION
  &--small
    +font-size('sm')

  &--medium
    +font-size('md')

  &--large
    +font-size('lg')

$dimensions: 16 24 32 48 64 96 128 !default

.image
  display: block
  position: relative
  img
    display: block
    height: auto
    width: 100%
    &.is-rounded
      border-radius: $radius-rounded
  &.is-fullwidth
    width: 100%
  // Ratio
  &.is-square,
  &.is-1by1,
  &.is-5by4,
  &.is-4by3,
  &.is-3by2,
  &.is-5by3,
  &.is-16by9,
  &.is-2by1,
  &.is-3by1,
  &.is-4by5,
  &.is-3by4,
  &.is-2by3,
  &.is-3by5,
  &.is-9by16,
  &.is-1by2,
  &.is-1by3
    img,
    .has-ratio
      @extend %overlay
      height: 100%
      width: 100%
  &.is-square,
  &.is-1by1
    padding-top: 100%
  &.is-5by4
    padding-top: 80%
  &.is-4by3
    padding-top: 75%
  &.is-3by2
    padding-top: 66.6666%
  &.is-5by3
    padding-top: 60%
  &.is-16by9
    padding-top: 56.25%
  &.is-2by1
    padding-top: 50%
  &.is-3by1
    padding-top: 33.3333%
  &.is-4by5
    padding-top: 125%
  &.is-3by4
    padding-top: 133.3333%
  &.is-2by3
    padding-top: 150%
  &.is-3by5
    padding-top: 166.6666%
  &.is-9by16
    padding-top: 177.7777%
  &.is-1by2
    padding-top: 200%
  &.is-1by3
    padding-top: 300%
  // Sizes
  @each $dimension in $dimensions
    &.is-#{$dimension}x#{$dimension}
      height: $dimension * 1px
      width: $dimension * 1px

$lato-font-path: "~lato-font/fonts"
$roboto-font-path: "~roboto-fontface/fonts/roboto-slab"

@font-face
  font-family: 'Lato'
  src: url('#{$lato-font-path}/lato-normal/lato-normal.woff2') format('woff2'), url('#{$lato-font-path}/lato-normal/lato-normal.woff') format('woff')
  font-weight: 400
  font-style: normal
  font-display: $font-display

@font-face
  font-family: 'Lato'
  src: url('#{$lato-font-path}/lato-bold/lato-bold.woff2') format('woff2'), url('#{$lato-font-path}/lato-bold/lato-bold.woff') format('woff')
  font-weight: 700
  font-style: normal
  font-display: $font-display

@font-face
  font-family: 'Lato'
  src: url('#{$lato-font-path}/lato-bold-italic/lato-bold-italic.woff2') format('woff2'), url('#{$lato-font-path}/lato-bold-italic/lato-bold-italic.woff') format('woff')
  font-weight: 700
  font-style: italic
  font-display: $font-display

@font-face
  font-family: 'Lato'
  src: url('#{$lato-font-path}/lato-normal-italic/lato-normal-italic.woff2') format('woff2'), url('#{$lato-font-path}/lato-normal-italic/lato-normal-italic.woff') format('woff')
  font-weight: 400
  font-style: italic
  font-display: $font-display

@font-face
  font-family: 'Roboto Slab'
  font-style: normal
  font-weight: 400
  src: url('#{$roboto-font-path}/Roboto-Slab-Regular.woff2') format('woff2'), url('#{$roboto-font-path}/Roboto-Slab-Regular.woff') format('woff')
  font-display: $font-display

@font-face
  font-family: 'Roboto Slab'
  font-style: normal
  font-weight: 700
  src: url('#{$roboto-font-path}/Roboto-Slab-Bold.woff2') format('woff2'), url('#{$roboto-font-path}/Roboto-Slab-Bold.woff') format('woff')
  font-display: $font-display
